case_title: LILY WO VS. KAMBIZ MARASHI et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WO, LILY SERVED AUG-03-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARASHI, KAYVON
